name: Shree Nivi Buildtech
aboutTitle: Engineered for Strength. Designed for Scale.
aboutStory: Established in 2001, Shree Nivi Buildtech has grown to become a premier leader in the infrastructure sector. We specialize in Pre-Engineered Buildings (PEB), complex steel structural works, and heavy industrial fabrication. Over the past 25 years, our commitment to cutting-edge engineering, uncompromising safety standards, and client-first delivery has powered over 1,500 projects across the region. From aerospace hangars to automobile assembly lines, we bridge the gap between design vision and physical endurance.
mdMessage: At Shree Nivi Buildtech, we believe steel is more than just a structural element; it is the skeleton of our country's economic future. When we construct a factory or raise a warehouse, we are laying down the foundations for industrial acceleration. Our focus remains on combining state-of-the-art automated machinery with the finest engineering minds to deliver projects faster, safer, and with superior cost-efficiencies.
mission: To design, manufacture, and erect the safest, most durable steel structures using sustainable engineering and automation, establishing ourselves as the gold standard of industrial infrastructure.
vision: To lead the global transition toward smart, rapid-build steel infrastructure, delivering eco-friendly, zero-defect structures that support the industries of tomorrow.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We enforce rigorous safety rules across all workshops and construction sites.

coreValues.title: Engineering Precision
coreValues.description: Every beam and bolt is checked to meet exact structural load calculations.

coreValues.title: Integrity & Trust
coreValues.description: We maintain transparent project timelines and pricing budgets.

coreValues.title: Innovation Driven
coreValues.description: We constantly invest in CNC machining and robotic fabrication.

journeyTimeline.title: Company Founded
journeyTimeline.description: Began operations as a steel structural fabrication workshop with a team of 10.

journeyTimeline.title: PEB Expansion
journeyTimeline.description: Pioneered Pre-Engineered Building manufacturing, doubling fabrication capacity.

journeyTimeline.title: Automated Fab Facility
journeyTimeline.description: Inaugurated a fully automated fabrication facility with advanced CNC machinery.

journeyTimeline.title: Global Quality Certifications
journeyTimeline.description: Achieved ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001, and OHSAS 18001 certifications.

journeyTimeline.title: Silver Jubilee & Automation Era
journeyTimeline.description: Celebrating 25 years of excellence, hitting 250+ tons of daily fabrication capacity.
